g.text: WHERE TRIM(value) != '' AND value IS NOT NULL;
WHERE CustId IS NULL OR CustId <= 0;
- Remove customers that were successfully classified
- Ensures we only delete customers in the list
- More precise than WHERE IN clause
- Clean up to maintain pool health
: Monitor pool health and cleanup efficiency
-- Optional: Log to application or file
2. Delete by specific CustId list (successful processing)
* Removes all retrieved records up to MaxId
- Indexed on ID and CustId: Fast lookup
- No risk of deleting active/pending records
